## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the change and what problem it solves. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the relevant option(s). -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring (no feature/bug change)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `build` — build system or dependency change
- [ ] `ci` — CI configuration change
- [ ] `chore` — other (tooling, config, etc.)

## Breaking Change?

- [ ] Yes — this PR introduces a **BREAKING CHANGE** (describe below)
- [ ] No

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix/feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass.
- [ ] Documentation (README, API docs) has been updated if needed.
- [ ] This PR has a single, focused change (avoid unrelated changes).

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues: Closes #N, Ref #N -->

Closes #
